evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: own the data infrastructure; drive monetization decisions; quick iterations

evidence.domain_risk: gaming sector; monetization/revenue focus without financial reporting

evidence.jd_authorship: own the data infrastructure; develop LTV models; analyze in-game economies; design A/B tests

evidence.stakeholder_orientation: monetization decisions; senior stakeholders; revenue operations
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Revenue and monetization focus indicates commercial orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level: own the data infrastructure; drive monetization decisions
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Strategic ownership signals indicate direction-setting responsibility.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Preference noted but not required; standard analytics work.

evidence.loss_aversion_framing: reliable A/B testing and pricing decisions
